name: Balticconnector Pipeline Damage
description: Loss of Balticconnector gas pipeline (7.2 mcm/day). Modeled after Oct 2023 Newnew Polar Bear incident.

expected_impacts.FI: Loss of pipeline gas import from Estonia. Inkoo FSRU compensates.
expected_impacts.EE: Reduced gas transit capacity. Relies on reverse flow from Latvia.

historical_reference: 2023-10-08 Newnew Polar Bear incident. Pipeline offline 6.5 months. No gas shortages occurred.
